About Me

I'm an MCA student with hands-on experience in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, Java, Python, SQL, and .NET. I enjoy building real-world applications that are clean, efficient, and user-friendly. My goal is to secure an entry-level software developer role where I can contribute to innovative projects and grow as a technology professional.
